feed.title: sakkamade
feed.subtitle: through life with yuri in heart

entry.title: Episode 28. Resurrection of Apricot and Whereabouts of Wager.

link.title: Episode 28. Resurrection of Apricot and Whereabouts of Wager.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Lydia, Rapha, and Yuuyami skinned Apricot’s artificial skin, and replaced some parts. Whereafter, they applied a new artificial skin, and changed colour of her hair to blue. Since Rapha declared: ‘Wah, it’s uncomfortable for SA series to resemble onee-chama,’ hair colour was changed to the degree when she can obtain a peace of mind. Apropos, we have not hitherto dressed her.

entry.title: Episode 27. Lydia and Ohan.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Ohan easily carried Apricot under his arm​. As expected,​ Ohan truly is powerful-, thought Lydia.

entry.title: Episode 26. Rapha and Yuuyami.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Upon the parched​ land was retching Rapha.

entry.title: Episode 25. Please Love.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: “What? By what means are you carrying that thing​?”

entry.title: Episode 24. Apricot of Woodland.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: As they proceed deeper the Woodland, quite soon Lydia lost a sense of direction. Despite daytime, Woodland was dim; the atmosphere felt chilly as though. Furthermore​, ground was bumpy that arduous to walk. Overall, such ominous place stimulated a human fear. Consequently, Lydia,

entry.title: Episode 23. My Hentai Motorbike.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Called by Lydia, Yuuyami walked into garage. It has been a week after returning from Rapha’s home. Outside the garage, toil AD proceed construction the Maker Factory. According to Yuuyami estimations, current progress being at thirty-five percent.

entry.title: Episode 22. Happy Dream for Evermore.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Upon following day of returning from Rapha’s house, Recycling Box spat out the error. It was the second after Lydia put her needless winter clothes into Recycling Box. The Recycling Box being a machine that disintegrating unnecessary items at the molecular level, and completely dispose them of the world. Energy generated whilst disintegration can be stored, up to fixed amount.

entry.title: Episode 21. Sayonara, See You Again.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: From Rapha’s perspective, Mika was an incomprehensible creature. Mika, the Third Tenmoku, creation of Angel Project, held far more intelligence than Rapha, and greatly excelled archaic humans in physical abilities. Researchers were overjoyed with it; only at the beginning however. Before long, they likewise recognised Mika as failure. Albeit Rapha was introduced to Mika as her younger sister, I didn’t feel like we would be getting along at all. Mika has never smiled nor altered her facial expression. Rapha couldn’t even paltry grasp the path of her thoughts. Hence, we instantly grew alienated. Since Rapha had Lucy however, that meant few to me. Thereafter, a few weeks later, I was scared to hear, Mika strangled a researcher. Perhaps, she would have done that to me as well. This estrangement rather positive​, I concluded. I also drew conclusion that the fact Lucy hadn’t hitherto met Mika being positive likewise. Whereas existence of Angel Project itself was concealed, Mika could not be judged officially. Due to prohibition for humankind​ to manufacture humans. But withal, people of desire to cross beyond such taboos had break forth into this world. Akin the group that gathered for Angel Project, whilst secretly advancing it. Mika was isolated, yet, strangely enough, no one offered to dispose of her. Under simple pretext: assuming they somehow manage her behaviour, Mika would be specimen of perfect success. In other words, even a failure at present could become corrected step by step, believed researchers.

entry.title: Episode 20. Pair of Subjects, Pair Little Sister.

link.title: Episode 20. Pair of Subjects, Pair Little Sister.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Lydia and Rapha were drinking café au lait​ in the dining room; at that time Yuuyami came in.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation
